zh.Vitré, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, France: 法國布列塔尼易爾-吉維拉維特雷
zh.lifeSummary: 當Emma de La Guerche於1090年出生在法國布列塔尼易爾-吉維拉維特雷時，她的父親Hay Gauthier de la Guerche Seigneur de la Guerche et de Pouancé20歲，母親Basilla de la Guerche21歲。她於1112年之前與Juhaël de Châteaubriand, Seigneur de Châteaubriand在艾歐洛結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1161年4月10日在她的家鄉享年71歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: La
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Hung, Cuong, Anh, Thanh, Ha, Hoang, Tuan, Chau, Hao, Hien, Hoa, Hue, Nam, Phong, Sinh, Tuong, Min, Tam, Tanh, Thai, Tham, Tinh, Yeong.  Chinese Hong, Hang, Sang, Tong, Chan, Chi, Hwa Ja, Hyung, Kam, Ki Bong, Kin, Man.
Vietnamese: from the Chinese surname 羅, see   Luo   1.
Vietnamese (Lã): from the Chinese surname 呂, see Lu 6 and 3 below.

variants.name: Luo
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wei, Jian, Yi, Ping, Yong, Zhen, Feng, Hong, Ming, Jin, Bin, Chen, Hai, Lan, Min, Huan, Hung, Shen, Tian.

Mandarin form of the surname 羅, meaning ‘net for catching birds’ or ‘to collect’ in Chinese: (i) from Luo (羅), the name of an ancient state (located in present-day Hubei province). After it was annexed by the state of Chu during the early Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ), people from the state migrated southwards and adopted Luo (羅) as their surname. (ii) from the Po Duo Luo (破多羅) and Chi Luo (叱羅) families from the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China, who changed their original surnames to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iii) from the personal name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅), leader of an ancient Turkic tribe who are believed to have migrated to China during the Tang dynasty (618–907  AD ). His descendants inherited his name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅) as their surname and shortened it to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iv) from the name of one of the seven families from the Bandun Man, an ethnic group residing in ancient southwestern China (located mainly in present-day Sichuan province).

nameMeanings.name: Emma
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Old French name, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, originally a short form of compound names such as Ermintrude containing the word erm(en), irm(en) ‘entire’. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, but its popularity in medieval England was greatly enhanced by the fact that it had been borne by the mother of Edward the Confessor, herself a Norman. In modern times, it was only in moderate use early in the 20th century but rose sharply in favour in the 1970s and has since remained perennially popular.

en.lifeSummary: When Emma de La Guerche was born in 1090, in Vitré, Ille-et-Vilaine, Brittany, France, her father, Hay Gauthier de la Guerche Seigneur de la Guerche et de Pouancé, was 20 and her mother, Basilla de la Guerche, was 21. She married Juhaël de Châteaubriand, Seigneur de Châteaubriand before 1112, in Europe. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 10 April 1161, in her hometown, at the age of 71.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Emma de La Guerche est née en 1090, à Vitré, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, France, son père, Hay Gauthier de la Guerche Seigneur de la Guerche et de Pouancé, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Basilla de la Guerche, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Juhaël de Châteaubriand, Seigneur de Châteaubriand avant 1112, à Europe. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 10 avril 1161, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 71 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Emma de La Guerche 1090 in Vitré, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Hay Gauthier de la Guerche Seigneur de la Guerche et de Pouancé 20 und ihre Mutter Basilla de la Guerche 21. Sie hat vor 1112 in Europa Juhaël de Châteaubriand, Seigneur de Châteaubriand geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 10. April 1161 im Alter von 71 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

Lei sposato Juhaël de Châteaubriand, Seigneur de Châteaubriand prima del 1112, nel Europa. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 10 aprile 1161, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 71 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Emma de La Guerche(이)가 1090년 프랑스 브레타그니 이레-트-빌레이인 비트e에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hay Gauthier de la Guerche Seigneur de la Guerche et de Pouancé(은)는 20세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Basilla de la Guerche(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 1112년 이전 우럽에서 Juhaël de Châteaubriand, Seigneur de Châteaubriand(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1161년 4월 10일 그녀의 고향에서 71세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Emma de La Guerche nasceu em 1090, em Vitré, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, França, seu pai, Hay Gauthier de la Guerche Seigneur de la Guerche et de Pouancé, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Basilla de la Guerche, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com Juhaël de Châteaubriand, Seigneur de Châteaubriand antes 1112, em Europa. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 10 de abril de 1161, em sua cidade natal, com 71 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Emma de La Guerche родилась в 1090 г. в местности витрe, илле-ет-вилеин, бретагн, Франция, её отцу по имени Hay Gauthier de la Guerche Seigneur de la Guerche et de Pouancé было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Basilla de la Guerche, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Juhaël de Châteaubriand, Seigneur de Châteaubriand перед 1112 г. в местности Европа. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 10 апреля 1161 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 71 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Emma de La Guerche nació en 1090, en Vitré, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Francia, su papá, Hay Gauthier de la Guerche Seigneur de la Guerche et de Pouancé, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Basilla de la Guerche, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Juhaël de Châteaubriand, Seigneur de Châteaubriand antes de 1112, en Europa. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 10 de abril de 1161, en su pueblo, a la edad de 71 años.
